file_insights.changes: Added try-catch blocks around all database query resolvers
file_insights.impact: Improved error handling and user experience

patterns_discovered: Consistent error handling pattern across GraphQL resolvers
Adding console.error for logging before throwing user-friendly errors
Preserving original resolver logic within try block
Throwing new Error with generic, user-friendly message
gotchas_discovered: Database queries can fail silently without proper error handling
Raw database errors should not be exposed to end-users
Authentication checks should still occur before database operations
recommendations: Implement global error handling middleware for GraphQL
Consider creating a centralized error logging mechanism
Add unit tests to verify error scenarios in resolvers
Use typed error classes for more granular error management
